name: Postcraft

releases.author: turuhiro26-hub
releases.description:
Fixes for Obsidian community review:
- Settings heading uses Setting().setHeading() instead of a raw h3 element
- Textarea width moved to a CSS class (no inline style)
- Anthropic API response is now typed (removes unsafe any access)
releases.name: Postcraft 1.0.1

releases.author: turuhiro26-hub
releases.description:
## Postcraft 1.0.0

Turn a selected note into ready-to-post X and LinkedIn drafts with one click.

### Features
- Convert selected Obsidian note to 3 X (Twitter) draft posts
- LinkedIn support (command palette + right-click)
- Voice profile: paste past posts as few-shot examples + tone presets (no_hype, casual, professional, witty)
- In-app editing with character counter + history (last 15 drafts)
- Bring Your Own Key (Anthropic Claude API)
- Claude Opus default, Sonnet selectable for cost efficiency
releases.name: Postcraft 1.0.0
